# Rose Berlang Ethanol

**Summary**: A method used to stain and identify living foraminifera.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-amao|Amao, 2017]] used Rose Bengal-Ethanol technique to identify living foraminifera in the Arabian Gulf.
